S.FORM: == 'ali' == plgan ayang 'ali' tmahuk qu syam ga, shhya' balay niqun.
S.PHON: == ʔaliʔ == plɣan ajaŋ ʔaliʔ tmaħuk qu s~ɕjam ɣa, s~ɕħħjaʔ βalaj niqun.

S.PHON: == ʔaliʔ == plɣan ajaŋ ʔaliʔ tmaħuk qu s~ɕjam ɣa, s~ɕħħjaʔ βalaj niqun.
